plugin_desc: Rittal CMC III SNMP baseline child template for network-service rack, environment, power and monitoring units under Rittal PEN 2606.7. This child template relies on the shared SNMP floor for MIB-II uptime and IF-MIB 64-bit HC interface traffic. The current MIB facts confirm unit, power-load, current-consumption, device-status and variable tables, but do not prove a stable shared scalar mapping for CPU, memory, fan or power health, so private health, environment and PDU business counters are not promoted into shared device-health metrics.
name: NetworkService
